risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Implementation Coordination
risk_summary: The project faces persistent substantial political and governance risks that constrain inter-departmental coordination required for implementation. Multiple critical activities require coordination between Finance Departments and Health Departments across provinces, with delays attributed to governance fragility.
evidence_quote: Implementation is pending and it requires coordination with Finance Department and Controller General Accounts.

risk_title: Provincial Governance Fragmentation Impeding Referral System Implementation
risk_summary: Referral system implementation is stalled in KP and Sindh provinces due to governance challenges, with only Punjab having finalized guidelines. This reflects broader provincial governance fragility affecting health service coordination.
evidence_quote: Referral guidelines finalized in Punjab but are being drafted in KP and Sindh provinces.

risk_title: Governance Capacity Constraints in Health Information System Integration
risk_summary: Health information system integration is progressing unevenly across provinces, with KP and Sindh facing governance and institutional capacity challenges in implementing DHIS2. This reflects fragile institutional capacity for coordinated implementation.
evidence_quote: Punjab has integrated its information system in EMR, while Sindh and KP are designing DHIS2 for integration. KP and Sindh are expected to have DHIS2 dashboard ready by December 2024.

risk_title: Governance Barriers to Performance Management System Implementation
risk_summary: Performance management system implementation in Punjab is stalled at draft stage awaiting departmental endorsement, indicating governance-level institutional constraints affecting accountability mechanisms.
evidence_quote: Document finalized by the health department but endorsement pending

risk_title: Provincial Governance Fragmentation in Public Financial Management
risk_summary: Public Financial Management policy implementation remains incomplete across provinces, with KP and Sindh having finalized policies but facing implementation delays due to coordination challenges between Finance and Health Departments.
evidence_quote: This activity was to be implemented by Sindh. It is part of the PFM policy note of Sindh which is approved now. This activity will be implemented in consultation with the Finance Department.
